music_prompt: Quirky playful stop-motion claymation adventure score, fully instrumental, no vocals: opens tense and comedic with plucky pizzicato strings, woodblock ticks and sneaky bass clarinet; blossoms into curious wonder with marimba, celesta and warm strings in the middle; builds to a warm triumphant whimsical finale with light brass, glockenspiel and hand claps, ending on a single bright resolved chord. Charming handmade animation feel.

beats.vo: This is Dave. It's 11 PM, his CPAs are up, and Meta just ate another test budget.
beats.sfx: soft tense office ambience: low computer hum, a wall of old monitors buzzing faintly, occasional worried beeps, quiet clock ticking, miniature room tone

beats.vo: Every week, he feeds the machine new creative…
beats.sfx: stop-motion foley: a heavy metal lever cranked with effort, mechanical ratchet clicks, a big clunky machine shudder, then a small crumpled paper ball plops into a metal tray
stop-motion foley: dozens of crumpled paper balls tumbling and bouncing in a cascade, papery rustles and soft thumps, a tired human sigh at the end
a heavy wooden door creaking slowly open, old hinges groan, then a warm magical shimmer whoosh and soft distant bubbling

beats.vo: Run by a guy with twelve years, and a hundred and fifty million dollars in ad spend behind him.
beats.sfx: magical alchemy lab ambience: glass potion flasks bubbling and fizzing, tiny steam hisses, gentle whimsical chimes, warm candle crackle

beats.vo: Inside: AI agents that build your ads…
beats.sfx: liquid pouring into a metal funnel with a musical gurgle, magical sparkle fizz, then big clay gears starting to turn with soft wooden clicks
rhythmic mechanical stamping press thumping steadily, conveyor belt clattering, small metallic dings on each stamp, playful factory rhythm

beats.vo: …and winners that surface while you sleep.
beats.sfx: a cascade of bright glass power-up chimes lighting one after another, soft magical glows pulsing, a pressure gauge creaking upward, steam puff

beats.vo: No more guessing. No more eleven PMs.
beats.sfx: calm cozy morning ambience: soft birdsong outside a window, gentle room tone, a quiet coffee sip and a satisfied exhale

beats.vo: Join five hundred media buyers turning ad spend into gold.
beats.sfx: a soft clay fist-bump thump, then a small cheerful crowd of tiny voices cheering and laughing, little glass flasks clinking in celebration

beats.vo: The AI Ad Alchemists. The anti-guru lab for paid social.
beats.sfx: a heavy gold bar sliding out of a metal slot and landing on wood with a satisfying weighty thunk, golden sparkle shimmer

beats.vo: Find us on Skool. Link below.
beats.sfx: warm magical resolve: a single potion flask bubbling gently, a soft triumphant shimmer chime, cozy candle crackle, gentle fade
